content:
✨ voidauth | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a centralized, secure, and user-friendly Single Sign-On (SSO) solution for managing access to multiple self-hosted applications.
✨ Key Features: • OpenID Connect (OIDC) Provider • Proxy ForwardAuth • User and Groups Management • User Self-Registration and Invitations • Customizable UI and Email Templates
📖 Summary: VoidAuth is an open-source Single Sign-On (SSO) solution designed for self-hosted applications. It acts as a central authentication provider using OpenID Connect (OIDC) and Proxy ForwardAuth, simplifying user management and enhancing security for a personal digital universe.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🚀 lodestone | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: Simplifying the setup and management of multiplayer game servers, particularly Minecraft, through an accessible graphical interface.
✨ Key Features: • Clean and intuitive UI • One-click installation and setup • Real-time server status • File manager (unzip, upload, download, copy, paste) • Collaborative remote server and resource management
📖 Summary: Lodestone is a free, open-source server hosting tool for Minecraft and other multiplayer games, built with Rust, React, and TypeScript. It offers a user-friendly interface for easy setup, real-time status monitoring, file management, and collaborative server administration, with a focus on security and extensibility.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
